RevokeRegularSecurityGroupRulesV2.clientToken: Idempotency token, an ASCII string of up to 64 characters. See [ClientToken Idempotency](VPC/API参考/通用说明.md#幂等性).
RevokeRegularSecurityGroupRulesV2.sgVersion: Security group version number, obtainable from the security group list.
RevokeRegularSecurityGroupRulesV2.securityGroupId: ID of the security group whose rules are to be revoked.
RevokeRegularSecurityGroupRulesV2.rule: Security group rule to be revoked.
RevokeRegularSecurityGroupRulesV2.rule.ethertype: Network type: IPv4 or IPv6. Defaults to IPv4 if empty.
RevokeRegularSecurityGroupRulesV2.rule.portRange: Port range, e.g. a single port like 80. Defaults to 1-65535 if empty.
RevokeRegularSecurityGroupRulesV2.rule.protocol: Protocol type: tcp, udp, or icmp. Defaults to all if empty.
RevokeRegularSecurityGroupRulesV2.rule.sourceIp: Source IP address. Cannot be set together with sourceGroupId.
RevokeRegularSecurityGroupRulesV2.rule.destIp: Destination IP address. Cannot be set together with destGroupId.
RevokeRegularSecurityGroupRulesV2.rule.createdTime: Creation time of the security group rule.
RevokeRegularSecurityGroupRulesV2.rule.updatedTime: Last modification time of the security group rule.
